name: China Gold International Resources Corp. Ltd.
description: China Gold International Resources Corp. Ltd. is a gold and base metal producer operating two mines in China: the CSH open-pit heap-leach gold mine in Inner Mongolia (in commercial production since 2008) and the Jiama copper-gold polymetallic mine in Tibet (one of the largest of its kind in China). The company is a dual-listed producer on the TSX and the Hong Kong Stock Exchange (HKEX: 2099), headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
